data.title: Move ASCII Sierpinski carpet art to Protocol page

data.body: Move the SierpinskiCarpet ASCII art component from the home page Hero section to the Protocol page (/the-protocol). Keep the skyline and other hero elements on the home page for now — just relocate the ASCII fractal animation. Files: src/components/sections/SierpinskiCarpet.tsx, src/components/sections/Hero.tsx, src/pages/ProtocolPage.tsx

REVIEW PASS. Reviewed cold against plan and acceptance criteria. Findings:

1. Hero.tsx: SierpinskiCarpet import and JSX block cleanly removed. Only skyline background remains. No orphaned references.
2. ProtocolPage.tsx: SierpinskiCarpet correctly added with import, wrapper div (relative h-[50vh] md:h-[60vh] w-full bg-background), and props (photoUrl with BASE_URL, autoPlay, padding=40, className w-full h-full). Existing 'Coming soon' section preserved below.
3. No dead imports: grep confirms only ProtocolPage.tsx imports SierpinskiCarpet (besides the component definition).
4. Typecheck: tsc --noEmit passes cleanly, zero errors.
5. Mobile-first: Container uses h-[50vh] mobile / md:h-[60vh] desktop. padding=40 leaves ~295px on 375px screens — well above component minimum.
6. Props: Dropped 'style' prop is intentional (was absolute overlay hack in Hero, not needed in container layout). All passed props match SierpinskiCarpetProps interface.
7. Diff: Single commit (784fbc2), two files touched, matches plan exactly.

All 7 acceptance criteria met. No regressions. Approving.
